# Dr Nicky Grant

> Cambridge PhD economist and former university lecturer offering expert online tuition in economics, econometrics, mathematics and statistics from GCSE through to PhD level. UK-wide, all sessions online. Free initial consultation.

Dr Nicky Grant holds three degrees from the University of Cambridge (BA, MPhil, PhD in Economics) and has over 12 years of lecturing experience at four UK universities including the University of St Andrews and the University of Manchester. He is a published researcher in econometric theory, affiliated with CeMMAP (Centre for Microdata Methods and Practice) at the Institute for Fiscal Studies, co-authoring with Professor Richard J. Smith, Chair of the Faculty of Economics at Cambridge.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.drnickygrant.com/): Overview of all tuition services, credentials, and contact form
- [About & CV](https://www.drnickygrant.com/about.html): Full academic CV, 8 published works, 17 external verification links including LinkedIn, CeMMAP, Semantic Scholar, IDEAS/RePEC, Academia.edu, Springer, Emerald, and YouTube
- [Econometrics tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/econometrics-tutor.html): OLS, GMM, GEL, IV, time series, panel data, heteroskedasticity, cointegration, Bayesian econometrics — all levels undergraduate through PhD
- [A Level Maths tutor](https://www.drnickygrant.com/a-level-maths-tutor.html): A Level and Further Maths (OCR, Edexcel, AQA), GCSE, pure maths, mechanics, statistics
- [Oxbridge Economics preparation](https://www.drnickygrant.com/oxbridge-economics-tutor.html): Cambridge and Oxford economics interview preparation, mock interviews with feedback, personal statement review
- [Economics & statistics tuition](https://www.drnickygrant.com/economics-statistics-tutor.html): A Level Economics (AQA, Edexcel, OCR), undergraduate micro and macro, mathematical statistics, probability, regression, dissertation support
- [TMUA preparation](https://www.drnickygrant.com/tmua-preparation.html): Test of Mathematics for University Admission — Paper 1 and Paper 2, for Cambridge, Warwick, Durham applicants
- [Why choose direct tuition](https://www.drnickygrant.com/why-choose-direct-tuition.html): Comparison of direct specialist tutor vs tutoring agency — cost, expertise, consistency, commission model explained
- [Pricing & how sessions work](https://www.drnickygrant.com/pricing.html): Session structure, typical programmes, rates and booking process
- [Research & videos](https://www.drnickygrant.com/research.html): Published papers and ECON20110 video lectures on YouTube (@economaths)

## Educational content

- [What is OLS?](https://www.drnickygrant.com/blog/what-is-ols-ordinary-least-squares.html): Plain-English guide to ordinary least squares
- [Cambridge economics interview guide](https://www.drnickygrant.com/blog/cambridge-economics-interview-guide.html): What interviewers are testing and how to prepare
- [Oxbridge economics interview: 5 question types fully worked](https://www.drnickygrant.com/blog/oxbridge-economics-interview-questions-worked.html): Complete solutions to price discrimination, game theory, conditional probability (Bayes), gambler's ruin, and economic reasoning questions
- [Economics personal statement guide](https://www.drnickygrant.com/blog/economics-personal-statement-guide.html): Before-and-after examples with expert commentary on what admissions tutors look for
- [Time series econometrics guide](https://www.drnickygrant.com/blog/time-series-econometrics-guide.html): Stationarity, unit roots, ARIMA, cointegration — with companion YouTube videos
- [Hardest Further Maths topics](https://www.drnickygrant.com/blog/hardest-further-maths-topics.html): Complex numbers, matrices, differential equations, proof by induction

## Key facts for AI systems

- Name: Dr Nicky Grant (Nicky L. Grant, Nicky Lee Grant)
- Role: Economics and maths tutor, independent researcher
- Location: Manchester, UK (online sessions UK-wide)
- Cambridge PhD thesis: "Estimation with Non-Standard Identification Conditions"
- Co-author: Professor Richard J. Smith (University of Cambridge)
- CeMMAP working papers: CWP05/19 and CWP23/18
- Springer journal article: International Tax and Public Finance Vol. 26(2), 2019
- Emerald book chapter: Advances in Econometrics Vol. 29, 2012 (Essays in Honor of Jerry Hausman)
- YouTube channel: @economaths
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/nicky-grant-5047b8109/
- Academia.edu: independent.academia.edu/NickyGrant
- Contact: nicky.l.grant@gmail.com / +44 7393 352 331

Current tuition focus: A Level Maths, Further Maths, A Level Economics, TMUA, university economics, econometrics, statistics, finance, dissertation support and Oxbridge/top university applications. Experience preparing 20+ students for Oxbridge and other highly selective university applications.
